---
ID: US-O30
Title: Complete Advanced Slide Edit Controls and Auto-Sizing Behavior
Status: Done
Verified: true
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As a slide editor user
I want full alignment, multi-select, sizing, and text-box auto-sizing controls
So imported and native slides can be edited with PowerPoint-like precision

Acceptance Criteria:
- [x] Multi-select supports align left/center/right and align top/middle/bottom plus distribute horizontal/vertical.
- [x] Keyboard and toolbar controls support deterministic movement and size adjustments with visible inspector values.
- [x] Text-container components can auto-size to content with explicit toggle rules and minimum constraints.
- [x] Font, color, and size controls operate consistently for single-select and eligible multi-select text operations.
- [x] Selection behavior supports marquee/multi-select ergonomics without breaking inline text editing.
- [x] E2E tests validate core manipulation workflows on both newly created and imported slides.
